en: Procedures must address the ability to test vital equipment, process control and safeguarding instrumentation.  Ensures that Process Control and Safeguarding loop-test have been carried out. Lines-up equipment and systems and verifies unit conforms to Procedures and Drawings for Process conditions. Ensures that all necessary commissioning documents for each step have been filled in.
Does the contractor program provide a procedure for handing over operations after maintenance or new construction?
